captions_untagged.explicit: So proud of my daughters for volunteering their weekend to help out at the branches here in Lincoln, Nebraska. Raising readers is honestly one of my favorite parts of being a mom.
captions_untagged.moderate: Stumbled across this throwback to April 2012 and I can't believe how fast time actually goes. Such a fun afternoon holding up the giant sign and promoting the summer reading challenge.
captions_untagged.no_leak: There is nothing quite like spending a weekend afternoon surrounded by books and good energy. Proud to hold up the giant sign and support such a great local program!
